positioning: Learning Designer and Program Manager focused on competency-based training, learning assets, evaluation systems, mentoring, and learning analytics.
usage: Use this file as AI-readable context for tailored CVs, cover letters, recruiter summaries, and portfolio item matching when the original portfolio artifacts are unavailable.
evidenceNote: Portfolio item titles, practice areas, descriptions, tags, source artifact paths, proof points, and outcome evidence are read from structured portfolio sources. Outcome evidence is limited to direct Proof Point impact entries. Role, audience, deliverables, skills, tools, AI hints, and CV bullets may include inferred fields and should be refined when exact Portfolio Item details are available.

Training Needs Analysis.defaultRole: Diagnosed learning and performance gaps, translated findings into training priorities, and prepared design-ready recommendations.

Training Proposal.defaultRole: Converted learning needs into a structured proposal with objectives, program logic, delivery plan, and expected outcomes.

Instructional Design.defaultRole: Structured learning objectives, session flow, learner activities, practice tasks, and evidence of competency.

Curriculum Development.defaultRole: Mapped competencies, learning sequence, program structure, and evidence requirements into a usable curriculum asset.

Learning Materials.defaultRole: Created facilitator-ready learning materials that convert concepts into structured explanations, activities, and learner prompts.

Assessment & Evaluation.defaultRole: Designed assessment and evaluation tools to measure learner understanding, behavior, quality, or decision readiness.

Learning Analytics.defaultRole: Converted learning data, response inputs, or budget assumptions into analysis-ready dashboards and decision tools.

L&D Strategy.defaultRole: Framed learning products, business goals, capability priorities, and growth logic into an actionable L&D plan.

Mentoring & Coaching.defaultRole: Structured mentoring activities, reflection prompts, and action planning tools to help learners move from insight to execution.

Presentation Design.defaultRole: Organized complex ideas into a clear slide narrative, evidence structure, and presentation-ready flow.

Custom Training & Workshops.defaultRole: Designed and delivered applied training or workshop experiences using practical activities, facilitation, and implementation support.

Review: Legacy Project.defaultRole: Produced an earlier portfolio item that demonstrates applied program, people, or learning operations capability.

Mentoring & Speaking.defaultRole: Designed a mentoring or speaking asset that helps learners build confidence, communication, and professional influence.
